records.m_Talk_FRA: Mon travail 95p moi, c'est de prot959ger les civils. Je dois 95xtre pr959par959 95p affronter le danger 95p tout moment.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Especially when a monster like her appears...

records.m_Talk_ENG: ... I'm sorry.
